headline: Pinnacle West Capital Hits High As Phoenix Demand Fuels Valuation Debate
summary: Pinnacle West Capital (NYSE:PNW) has reached a new 52 week high, supported by its current financial position and growing electricity demand in the Phoenix area. The company is drawing attention for its mix of nuclear, solar, and battery storage investments at a time when the sector is changing. Analysts are divided on the long term outlook, making the recent share price move a key focus for investors. Pinnacle West Capital, trading on the NYSE under ticker PNW, last closed at $103.59 after...

headline: PwC's C-suite survey finds 87% see disruption as an opportunity
summary: CNBC’s “Squawk Box” team discusses PwC's C-suite survey results with Paul Griggs, U.S. senior partner and CEO of PwC.
